mrp_clause_text:
2. SSA Amendments. Unless expressly specified otherwise, the following amendments to the SSA shall be effective from the Second Amendment Effective Date:

2.1. Revised Solar Discount. The value of the Solar Discount as set forth in Exhibit C of the SSA is hereby amended from 10% and restated as 15%, provided the conditions recorded in Clause 2.2 of this Agreement
notes: This appears to be an amendment to a solar service agreement that changes the Solar Discount from 10% to 15%. This is not an MRP formula but rather a discount amendment clause. The text is cut off and references conditions in Clause 2.2 that are not visible.
